% vmap-bank.tex -- a single problem with a solution, for the .vmap marker test.
% VSTEM appears in every copy; VSOLUTION renders only in the key (solutions)
% copies, so the test can confirm each engine-emitted .vmap marker points at a
% page slice whose content matches the marker's copy type.
\begin{problem}{vprob}[topic=v]
	VSTEM common problem stem.
	\begin{solution}
	VSOLUTION only in key copies.
	\end{solution}
\end{problem}
